ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-18-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Continued To Feb-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alicia Gamez for and with Sandra Springfield.

The Court noted that there is the issue of providing information to the California Victim Compensation Board (VCB"), how the funds are currently being maintained and stated that the funds need to be in insured accounts and that right now the funds are in two banks. Ms. Gamez stated that as of today there is $249,714.00 in one account and $254,987.00 in another account, and that if the matter does not close today, they will open another account. Ms. Gamez also stated that initially there were efforts to contact the Heir (Lamar Springfield), that the Parent of that Heir recently provided partial information and that they provided it to the VCB. In addition, Ms. Gamez stated that there is a pour over will and everything goes to the trust, that on October 2nd another report was provided to the VCB, that on May 8th through a published e-mail a report was sent to the VCB informing them that the trust is subject to litigation in Alameda and provided information that the funds were there, that they do not have the Heir's CDCR number and they believe he is no longer incarcerated, that she received an e-mail from the VCB this morning confirming receipt and that the VCB has four months from October 2, 2019 to reply. The Court stated that it is not sure if the time for the VCB to reply is from today or October 2nd and noted that they will now have to wait for that time period. The Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to February 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Gamez is to provide a status report regarding the California VCB's notice and the Executor is to adjust the bank accounts.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
